name: Shenstone,Stonnal,Little Aston

links.title: Shenstone, Stonnall and Little Aston Neighbourhood Newsletter

description:
The villages owe their popularity to their proximity to Birmingham and the busy West Midlands.

Families choosing to live here enjoy a peaceful, semi-rural life knowing that Britain’s second city, with all its glitz and glamour, is close by. Little Aston also borders the West Midlands and is a popular residential area.

Shenstone, Stonnall and Little Aston all share the same parish council. There are railway stations at Shenstone and Little Aston linking to Birmingham and beyond.
